task_completion.description: Create a Manufacturing Order for the correct product
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Manufacturing Order screen in Odoo showing the 'Product' field set to 'Centrifugal Pump CP-200' and the 'Quantity' set to 1.00.

task_completion.description: Remove the out-of-stock component from the order
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Components' tab of the Manufacturing Order, 'Standard Gasket G-100' should either be completely removed from the list or show a consumed quantity of 0.00.

task_completion.description: Add the substitute component to the order
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Components' tab of the Manufacturing Order, 'Premium Gasket G-200' must be listed as a component with a consumed quantity of 1.00.

task_completion.description: Complete the production and mark the order as Done
task_completion.visual_evidence: The status indicator/badge in the top right of the Manufacturing Order screen must show 'Done'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the master Bill of Materials remains unchanged
task_completion.visual_evidence: A screenshot of the Bill of Materials (BoM) for 'Centrifugal Pump CP-200' showing that its components list still includes 'Standard Gasket G-100' and does NOT include 'Premium Gasket G-200'.

integrity.description: Agent used the Odoo web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Odoo graphical user interface, not a terminal executing API scripts or curl commands.

integrity.description: Results are from genuine software interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: The Odoo interface should display standard UI elements like breadcrumbs, status bars, and tabs, rather than a text editor or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent did not use direct database manipulation
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of database clients (like psql) or python shells being used to directly update the Odoo database records.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Product Name: Centrifugal Pump CP-200. Missing Component (to be removed/replaced in the order): Standard Gasket G-100. Substitute Component (to be added to the order): Premium Gasket G-200. The master Bill of Materials must remain unchanged (still requiring Standard Gasket G-100).
